debug_info.goal:
case neg.inl.sndE
n : ℕ
S : Error.Dist n
a b : Error.Agent n
σ : List (Error.Call n)
this : @S b = true
callee✝ err✝ : Error.Agent n
o : Error.maxOne n (Error.Call.sndE n a callee✝ err✝ :: σ)
a_not_know_before_t :
  ¬Error.eval n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.sndE n a callee✝ err✝) σ o⟩
      (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true)))
a_not_know_before_f :
  ¬Error.eval n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.sndE n a callee✝ err✝) σ o⟩
      (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, false)))
a_knows_after_t :
  Error.eval n S ⟨Error.Call.sndE n a callee✝ err✝ :: σ, o⟩ (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true)))

            have wrong_deleted : (b, !S b) ∉ resultSet a S ⟨C :: σ, o⟩ := by

                  apply nk
                  apply a_knows_after_f _ ⟨Call.normal a b :: τ.1, by simp [maxOne]; omega⟩
                  simp [equiv, hl, heq, roleOfIn, roleOfIn_a, contribSet, Call.pair]
                  simp [stubbornness, nk]
              · -- err != b. inv err doesn't touch b. a receives correct value.
                simp [resultSet, roleOfIn_a]
                left; left; right
                simp [invert, stubbornness, he]
                simp
                match S b with
                | true => exact a_not_know_before_f
                | false => exact a_not_know_before_t
